description: SDD hooks: 3 UserPromptSubmit gates (propose: [TBD] cleared; apply: prerequisites ready — proposal with all four sections + single active change; archive: flow wasn't bypassed, loop changes audited via loop.md done+checked) + 2 Stop hooks (loop-driver: re-injects /spec:loop rounds via the Stop JSON contract, runs first; check-verify-reminder: turn ended with approved proposal but no verification ledger). Shell-form entries: Claude Code runs the command string under sh on macOS/Linux and Git Bash on Windows, so ONE POSIX sh implementation serves every platform. $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT is expanded by the shell from the exported environment; the gates read the project dir from $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR and the user input from the stdin JSON `prompt` field (probe-verified against real stdin, 2026-07-15; Stop re-injection probe-verified 2026-07-17).
